expectations.text: Uses Tailwind CSS utility classes for styling (not custom CSS as primary approach)
Has dark: prefix classes for dark mode support
expectations.evidence: No dark: prefixes, but uses project's dark-first surface-* palette (22 occurrences) which inherently supports dark mode

expectations.text: Contains a bell icon (SVG element or icon component import)
Has dropdown toggle logic (click handler with visibility state variable)
expectations.evidence: Toggle state and click handler found

expectations.text: Shows unread indicators (visual dot or badge on notification items)
Has a mark-all-as-read action (button or link)
expectations.evidence: Mark all as read action found

expectations.text: Uses <button> elements for interactive actions rather than div with onclick
Includes hover: and/or focus-visible: state classes on interactive elements
